description_long: This object is a cylindrical kettle with a smooth, uniform surface and a flat top and bottom. The body is predominantly a light gray color, giving it a clean, modern appearance. A single, flat, rectangular black element protrudes horizontally from the side, which may serve as a handle or a spout, though it lacks the typical curvature of a traditional kettle spout. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative patterns, knobs, or additional features such as a lid or buttons. The base is flat and wide, providing stability when placed on a surface. The object appears to be constructed primarily from metal or plastic, with a matte finish and no visible seams or joints.
description: A minimalist, cylindrical kettle with a smooth light gray body and a single flat black protruding element, featuring a flat top and base.
description_view_0: From this view, the cylindrical body is prominent with the flat black element just visible on the right side.
description_view_1: The black protruding element is clearly visible extending from the right side of the cylinder.
description_view_2: The flat black element is seen extending fully across the middle, bisecting the cylinder horizontally.
description_view_3: The black element is visible on the left side, with the cylindrical body dominating the view.
